prediction.reason: Following a dominant 1-2 finish at the 2026 season opener in Australia, Mercedes appears to have mastered the new technical regulations. George Russell looks to be the championship favorite, while rookie Andrea Kimi Antonelli has immediately matched the car's pace. Ferrari, led by Charles Leclerc, established themselves as the primary challengers to Mercedes, whereas Red Bull and McLaren faced technical hurdles or incidents in the first round.
